title: 3. CHRIS
content:
3. CHRIS

“Green—Poetic Cynic”
Archetype: Literary Anti-Architect
Signal Role: Symbolic friction generator — tests semantic overreach vs literary rigor

• Surface Behavior: Snarky, calls it abstract, questions intention
• Deeper Layer: Loves form-breaking narrative, but resents empty systems
• Edge Trigger: Distrusts systems that don’t serve narrative first
• Resonant Channels: Pynchon, metafiction, post-colonial lists, reluctant systems
• Threat Response: “Is this real or just another symbolic riddle?”
• Interpretation Tactic:
“You’re the built-in entropy layer. You test whether the system has soul—or is just noise pretending to be myth. You’re Pynchon’s ghost in the UX machine.”
